name: Miniature Bacon- Cheese Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry shells: Combine the cream cheese, margarine, and flour in a bowl. Shape into 1-inch balls and place them in lightly greased miniature muffin pans (1 3/4 inch). Press fork through each ball to form shells and prick with fork. Bake at 400 degrees for 5 minutes.
2. Prepare filling: Combine the onion, bacon, Cheddar cheese, Swiss cheese, and cook until set. Fill each pastry shell with the mixture.
3. Add liquid filling: In a large bowl, combine eggs, half & half, salt, and pepper. Pour into the pastry shells over the bacon mixture.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or until set. Can be prepared ahead of time and frozen.
